1. Introduction

Agriculture is a major part of Pakistan's economy, contributing approximately 19.2% to the GDP and employing around 38.5% of the country's labor force. Many farmers rely on local markets (mandis) to sell their crops. However, farmers often lack easy access to updated crop prices and market trends, leading to situations where they sell crops at lower prices due to limited information.

With the growth of smartphones across rural and semi-urban areas of Pakistan, a mobile application can help farmers and traders easily access crop price information, market trends, and useful agricultural tools. The proposed application AgriPulse aims to provide a simple yet powerful platform where users can check mandi prices, monitor trends, and access helpful farming information — all from the convenience of their mobile phones.

This document presents the mid-term progress of the AgriPulse project, focusing on the complete User Interface (UI) implementation built using the Flutter framework.

2. Problem Statement

Farmers and traders in Pakistan often face significant difficulties in obtaining updated crop price information from different mandis (agricultural markets). Most farmers depend on middlemen or physical visits to markets to know current prices. This process is inefficient, time-consuming, and sometimes leads to unfair pricing due to information asymmetry.

The lack of a centralized, digital platform for accessing real-time mandi data means that farmers are frequently at a disadvantage when negotiating crop prices. There is a critical need for a mobile application that provides easy, transparent access to crop prices and agricultural market intelligence.

3. Proposed Solution

The proposed solution is AgriPulse, a mobile application that provides crop price information from different markets along with useful farming tools and market insights. The application offers an easy-to-use, visually appealing interface where users can:

  • View current crop prices from various mandis across Pakistan
  • Monitor historical price trends using interactive charts
  • Locate nearby mandis and view their details
  • Set price alerts for specific crops
  • Calculate profit using a built-in profit calculator
  • Stay updated with agriculture news
  • Check weather advisories relevant to farming

For the mid-term submission, the focus has been on developing a complete, polished user interface (UI) with sample data. Backend services and real-time data integration will be added in subsequent phases.

4. Objectives

  • To develop a mobile application that displays crop market prices from mandis across Pakistan.
  • To design a user-friendly, visually appealing interface suitable for farmers and traders of all technology skill levels.
  • To provide crop price analysis and market insights through interactive charts and analytics.
  • To introduce helpful tools for agricultural decision making, including a profit calculator and price alerts.
  • To build a scalable mobile application architecture that supports future enhancements such as AI-based predictions and real-time data.
  • To implement a complete authentication flow with login, signup, password recovery, and OTP verification screens.

8. Application Screens & Screenshots

This section provides screenshots and descriptions of each screen in the AgriPulse application. The application contains 20+ unique screens organized into logical modules.

8.1 Splash Screen

The Splash Screen is the first screen displayed when the application launches. It features a beautiful gradient background in the primary dark green color scheme. The screen displays the app name "AgriPulse" in large bold Poppins font with the tagline "Smart Farming Insights." After a 2-second delay, it automatically transitions to the Login Screen with a smooth fade animation.

8.2 Login Screen

The Login Screen provides the main authentication interface. The top section features a green gradient header with the wheat emoji icon and "Welcome Back!" title. The form includes Email Address and Password fields with icons, password visibility toggle, "Forgot Password?" link, Login button, "Continue as Guest" option, and a "Sign Up" link for new users.

8.3 Sign Up Screen

The Sign Up Screen allows new users to create an account. It displays "Join AgriPulse" header and includes fields for Full Name, Phone Number, Email Address, Password (with visibility toggle), Confirm Password, and a dropdown for role selection (Farmer, Trader, or Both). The role selection helps tailor the app experience to the user's needs.

8.4 Forgot Password Screen

Accessed when a user taps "Forgot Password?" on the Login Screen. It displays an instruction message to enter email for a 6-digit OTP, an email input field, and a "Send OTP" button that navigates to the OTP Verification Screen.

8.5 OTP Verification Screen

The second step in password recovery. It shows a text field for entering the 6-digit OTP code with a countdown timer from 30 seconds. A "Resend OTP" button becomes active when the timer reaches zero. The "Verify OTP" button proceeds to the Reset Password Screen.

8.6 Reset Password Screen

The final step in password recovery. Contains "New Password" and "Confirm Password" fields with lock icons. The "Update Password" button completes the process and navigates back to the Login Screen with a success message.

8.7 Home Screen (Dashboard)

The central hub of AgriPulse featuring: a collapsible AppBar with greeting and profile avatar; summary cards for Today's Markets (12 Open), Price Alerts (2 Active), and Top Crop (Wheat ↑); Quick Access cards for Market Overview and Weather; Today's Top Prices with trend indicators; Nearby Mandis section; and Latest News. A 5-tab bottom navigation bar provides access to Home, Crops, Mandi, Tools, and News sections.

C:\Users\Abdullah Javed
8.8 Crop Prices List Screen

Displays all crops in a 2-column grid layout with a search bar and horizontal filter chips (All, Grains, Vegetables, Cash Crops). Each crop card shows the crop emoji, name, current price in PKR, and a color-coded trend indicator (green for up, red for down, amber for stable).

8.9 Crop Detail Screen

Provides comprehensive information about a specific crop including: a Hero section with crop emoji, name, and Urdu name; current price card with yesterday's comparison; statistics row showing Today's High, Low, and 7-Day Average prices; an interactive 7-day line chart built with fl_chart package featuring curved lines, dot markers, and touch tooltips; and a "Set Price Alert" button.

8.10 Mandi List Screen

Displays all agricultural markets with a summary banner showing total mandis and how many are open. Features include search by name or city, filter chips (All, Open, Closed), and mandi cards showing name, city, province, distance, open/closed status with colored indicator, and total crops available.

8.11 Mandi Detail Screen

Complete information about a specific mandi including: header with mandi name, city, province, open/closed status badge, and operating hours (6:00 AM - 2:00 PM); a map placeholder showing the city location; Available Crops section listing crops with emoji, English and Urdu names, current price, and trend status; and Contact Info section showing phone number and full address.

8.12 Farming Tools Screen

A utility screen with two major sections: (1) Profit Calculator with Selling Price, Quantity, and Total Cost inputs that displays Revenue, Cost, Net Profit, and Profit Margin results; (2) Price Alerts section with crop dropdown, Above/Below condition selector, target price input, and Active Alerts list showing configured alerts with status badges and delete functionality.

8.13 Agriculture News Screen

Provides latest agricultural updates with horizontal filter chips (All, Market, Weather, Government, Tips). The first item is displayed as a featured card with gradient background, and remaining items as standard cards with emoji, title, description, date, and category tag. Tapping any card opens the full article in the News Detail Screen.

10. Future Enhancements

  • Firebase Integration: Backend database and authentication services for real user accounts.
  • Real-Time Price Data: Integration with government mandi price databases for live crop prices.
  • AI-Based Price Prediction: Machine learning models to forecast crop prices.
  • Google Maps Integration: Interactive maps showing mandi locations with directions.
  • Farmer-to-Buyer Marketplace: Direct trading platform connecting farmers with buyers.
  • Weather API Integration: Real-time weather data for accurate forecasts.
  • Multi-Language Support: Complete Urdu translation for all screens.
  • Push Notifications: Cloud messaging for real-time price alerts.
  • Offline Support: Cached data for areas with limited connectivity.

11. Conclusion

The AgriPulse mobile application aims to improve access to agricultural market information for farmers and traders across Pakistan. This mid-term submission demonstrates the complete User Interface (UI) implementation with 20+ fully functional screens covering authentication, market data display, analytical tools, news, and user profile management.

The application features a clean, modern design with a consistent green agricultural theme, smooth navigation flows, interactive charts for data visualization, and practical tools like the Profit Calculator and Price Alert system. The use of Flutter ensures cross-platform compatibility with both Android and iOS from a single codebase.

By providing mandi price data, market analytics, and farming tools through an intuitive mobile platform, AgriPulse supports better decision-making and increases transparency in crop markets — empowering Pakistan's farming community with accessible, actionable market intelligence.

AgriPulse — Smart Agricultural Market Monitoring App
